title: Ma'an Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ma'an with a Z-Score of +3.20. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Ma'an are extremely hot and dry, with a relative humidity of 24% and wind speed of 20.1 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 10.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. 
 The impact of this heat wave is expected to be severe, with potential disruptions to daily life and economic activities.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical event.
